data.body:
# Post-epic-a88f hardening: workflow-engine prior-art gotchas + coverage gaps

Follow-up to epic a88f (LLM Workflow Engine). Two validation subagents (a coverage
audit and a prior-art comparison vs GHA / Argo / Inspect / dotprompt / tarfile CVE)
surfaced verified defects + coverage holes. Synthesized, verified each empirically,
fixed the valid ones, and closed the coverage gaps. Tracking ticket:
crude-hook-stomp (c9be-211c-7c4e-4528), now closed.

## Coverage verdict (behavioral + contractual × hermetic + external)
- Hermetic behavioral: STRONG (DSL parse/lint/migrate, executor ordering + if-guard
  + marker-after-effect resume + idempotent comment, snapshot, prompts/variants,
  eval discipline, FakeRunner e2e).
- External behavioral: WAS ZERO for the engine -> closed.
- Contractual hermetic: review_result + WORKFLOW_RUN on MCP reads; event-shape replay.
- Contractual: CLI --output json was NOT schema-pinned -> closed.
- Crash-resume already covered (test_resume_skips_already_marked_step,
  test_comment_verdict_is_idempotent) - audit claim there was inaccurate.

## Commits
- 7622149b  fix(workflow): harden against prior-art gotchas (GHA/Argo/tarfile/dotprompt)
- 6426ab81  test(workflow): close external + contractual coverage gaps

## Verified + fixed gotchas
- #1 bare `if:` (no ${{ }}) silently always-true (the GHA trap) - lint rejects
  non-${{}} guards; executor _guard_passes fails closed. (lint.py / executor.py)
- #3 secrets.* forbidden in an if: guard (control flow must not branch on a credential).
- #4 duplicate YAML mapping keys rejected (schema.py construct_mapping; was PyYAML
  silent last-wins; Argo/GHA reject).
- #19 tarfile.data_filter absent on Python 3.11.0-3.11.3 but requires-python>=3.11 -
  _require_safe_extraction() fails closed (CVE-2007-4559). (snapshot.py)
- #20 git-archive child zombie/FD leak on error -> wait()+close pipes.
- #21 file-count cap added alongside byte cap; TTL sweep restores write bits via
  _rmtree_writable so read-only snapshot trees are actually GC'd. (executor.py sweep)
- #24 JUnit wrapped in <testsuites> root + quoteattr + failure body (promptfoo interop).
- #25 grader snapshot must be embedded in pinned model id (no drift). (eval.py)
- #27 unsatisfiable at_least(k>epochs) gate rejected at validation time.
- run_eval raises NotImplementedError (not EvalError) when the live harness is unwired.
- #30/#31 prompt front-matter survives CRLF/BOM (Windows checkout / autocrlf).
- #32 declared-but-optional prompt vars default to empty (match prompt_input_schema);
  no-front-matter review path stays strict.
- #33 variant overlay UNIONS base+variant variables/required when it splices the base
  (<!--base-->); a full override keeps only its own decls.

## NOT a code defect
- #14/#15/#16 (include_raw / parsing_error / pairing-across-retries) were stale ACs on
  the closed WS-D4 ticket, not code. runner.py docstrings already accurate. No change.

## Coverage tests added
- tests/external/test_workflow_live.py - live code_review run via RunnerAgentStep.
- tests/interfaces/contracts/test_workflow_cli_output_contract.py - CLI json <-> WORKFLOW_RUN.
- tests/interfaces/contracts/test_workflow_schema_golden.py - frozen immutable v1 schema.
- tests/unit/workflow/test_prior_art_hardening.py + additions to test_eval.py /
  test_prompt_variants.py - regression tests for every fix above.

## Verification
Full unit suite: 1428 passed, 1 skipped. ruff clean. Working tree clean; both commits on main.
